description.value:
Frequency once per hour

You spew a dense cloud of fungal spores. Plants and fungi are immune to this effect, but all other creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC with the following results.

Critical Success No effect.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] for 1 round.

Failure The creature is dazzled and can see only 10 feet away for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Blinded] for 1 round.
